あ、司令官！<br>今ね～、食堂で野菜の皮と食パンの耳をもらってきたんだ！:
Ah, Commander! I just grabbed some vegetable peels and bread crusts
from the cafeteria!
野菜の皮はスープの出汁が取れるし、<br>食パンの耳は揚げたらオヤツになるからね:
Vegetable peels make great soup stock, and bread crusts turn into a
tasty snack when you fry them!
ん？ 今、貧乏くさいとか思ったでしょ？ まぁ、ワタシも昔、<br>お屋敷に住んで:
Huh? You just thought I was being cheap, didn't you? Well, back when
I lived in a mansion, I used to eat cake and steak and stuff, but...
あ、ワタシね、こう見えても結構いい家柄のお嬢様だったんだから！<br>立派な騎士:
Despite how I look, I was from a good family! I was supposed to be a
fine knight—my expected future, but...
おっとっと！ ごめんね、暗い話はじめちゃって……。<br>今からスープとオヤツ作:
Whoops! Sorry, I started a gloomy story there... I'm about to make
soup and snacks, so wanna be my taste-tester?
